metadata.governance: Enterprise Asset Governance v1.1 - metadata scaffold pending binary asset import

production-logos.description: Reserved production logo metadata. Binary logo files must be committed before production approval.

design-references.description: Reserved design reference metadata. Binary reference files must be committed before display.

generated-concepts.description: Reserved generated concept metadata. Binary concept files must be committed before display.

preview-utilities.description: Reserved preview utility metadata. Binary preview files must be committed before display.

rules: Production assets must not be marked approved until the referenced binary file is committed
Design references are for inspiration only - not production logos
Generated concepts require approval before production deployment
Asset paths should be referenced through assetPaths.ts constants or AssetLoader helpers only
Any new assets must have both metadata entries and committed binary files
governance.reviewProcess: Add binary assets first, then add matching provenance metadata and approval status in the same pull request.

changeLog.change: Converted provenance to metadata scaffold because referenced binary assets are not present in this pull request
changeLog.author: JayPVentures governance stabilization
